'''Canti''' was a planet located in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Canti system/Legends|Canti system]]. A secret [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] ran from Canti out of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. The existence of the route was closely guarded by [[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]].<ref name="LE" />

{{Planet-stub}}
